ns1:revision.ns1:comment: add links to adjacent LUG events
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
OpenSFS was proud to host LUG 2015 in Denver, Colorado on April 13-15, 2015 * [http://opensfs.org/events/lug-2015/ OpenSFS LUG 2015 Site]
== Presentations ==
* Welcome Remarks and Lustre 101, Stephen Simms, LUG Program Chair ** [[Media:Lustre-Overview-for-Newcomers_Simms.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://insidehpc.com/2015/04/video-steve-simms-teaches-lustre-101-lug-2015/ Video] * OpenSFS Update, Charlie Carroll, Cray, ** [http://wp.me/p3RLHQ-e1z Video] * EOFS Update, Hugo Falter, EOFS ** [[Media:EOFS_Status-Report_Falter.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://insidehpc.com/2015/04/video-eofs-update-lug-2015/ Video] * Demo: Installing Lustre 2.7 via RPM, Brian Andrus from the ITACS/Research Computing Naval Postgraduate School ** [[Media:Lustre-101_Andrus.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=16UHNhwTMqs Video] * Lustre Development Update, Christoper Morrone, OpenSFS/LLNL ** [[Media:Lustre_Development_Update_Morrone.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://insidehpc.com/2015/04/video-lustre-development-update-lug-2015/ Video] * Lustre + Linux – Putting the House in Order, James Simmons,ORNL ** [[Media:Status-of-Linux-Upstream-Lustre-Client_Simmons.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sa-eFDRdND8 Video] * Cray’s Storage History and Outlook – Lustre+, Jason Goodman, Cray ** [[Media:Cray-Sponsor-Presentation_Goodman.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://youtu.be/QQoLuyYVnDc Video] * From Lab to Enterprise – Growing the Lustre Ecosystem, Malcolm Cowe, Intel ** [[Media:From-Lab-to-Enterprise_Cowe.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://youtu.be/QIO2nXX8dfk Video] * SDSC’s Data Oasis Gen II: ZFS, 40GbE, and Replication, Rick Wagner, San Diego Supercomputer Center ** [[Media:SDSC-Data-Oasis-GEn-II_Wagner.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://insidehpc.com/2015/04/video-sdscs-data-oasis-gen-ii-zfs-40gbe-replication/ Video] * There and Back Again – The Battle of Lustre at LANL, Kyle Lamb, Michael Masson, and Susan CoulterLANL ** [[Media:There-and-back-again_LANL1.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q-LmYN4WE1s Video] * Seagate Lustre Update, Peter Bojanic,Seagate Technology ** [[Media:LUG-2015-Seagate-v2.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://wp.me/p3RLHQ-e2g Video] * Lustre & Kerberos: In Theory and In Practice, Sebastien Buisson, Bull ** [[Media:Lustre-and-Kerberos_Buisson.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_f7rSIADXuo Video] * GSS Shared Key Update and Using UID Mapping in Lustre 2.7, Steve Simms, Indiana University ** [[Media:GSS-Shard-key-Update-and-Using-UID_Simms.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://youtu.be/FJRr79RzwZw Video] * ZFS as Backend File System for Lustre: Current Status, How to Optimize, Where to Improve, Gabriele Paciucci Intel ** [[Media:ZFS-As-Backend-File-System_Paciucci.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WXAG7ht1kic Video] * Per User Lustre File Systems Leveraging ZFS Pools, Marc Stearman, LLNL ** [[Media:Per-User-Lustre-File-Systems-Leveraging-ZFS_Stearman.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://youtu.be/yJI37f3ZM_M Video] * Lustre 2.8 and Beyond, Andreas Dilger, Intel ** [[Media:Lustre-2.8-and-Beyond_Dilger.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GmAiT-g8448 Video] * Progressive File Layouts, John Hammond, Intel; Jason Hill, ORNL ** [[Media:Progressive-File-Layouts_Hammond.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5rm6Nlmqdp0 Video] * Intelligent Cache Hinting in Lustre, Micah Bhakti, Intel ** [[Media:Intelligent-Cache-Hinting_Bhakti.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CUTqGSh4Zek Video] * Intel and Lustre: ­ Growth of Lustre Adoption and Intel’s Continued Commitment, Brent Gorda, Intel ** [[Media:BGorda-2015-04-14-LUG-v9.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C8lv3cAEleY Video] * Lustre HSM in the cloud, Robert Read, Intel ** [[Media:Lustre-HSM-in-the-Cloud_Read.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zACHVrHDsLU Video] * Application-optimized Lustre Solutions for Big-Data Workflows, Robert Triendl, DDN ** [[Media:LUG-Presentation-Final_Triendl.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://youtu.be/ZGETY9Yu0Js Video] * Metadata Access Reduction and Analysis and Elimination of Client Evictions on a Large Scale Lustre Based File System, Keiji Yamamoto, RIKEN AICS; Shinji Sumimoto, Fujitsu ** [[Media:Metadata-Access-Reduction-and-Analaysis_Yamamoto_Sumimoto.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GiYc-BRQ4Yw Video] * Lustre Network (LNET) Router Configuration and Tuning, John Fragalla, Seagate Technology ** [[Media:Lustre-Network-Router-Config_Fragalla.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://youtu.be/bm_uPtNsd1Y Video] * Towards continuous 24x7x365 production operation on a router-less 20 petabyte, 11,200 node cluster-or-Defending the Planet with Lustre: Your life could depend on it!, Bob Ciotti, NASA ** [[Media:Towards-Continuous-Production-Operation_Ciotti.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://insidehpc.com/2015/04/video-defending-planet-lustre/ Video] * Lustre Metrics: NewTechniques for Monitoring Lustre, Scott Nolin, Andrew Wagner, UW Space Science and Engineering Center ** [[Media:Lustre-Metrics-New-Techniques-for-Monitoring_Nolin_Wagner.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://youtu.be/iM6fW4oxBm4 Video] * New and Improved Lustre Performance Monitoring Tool, Torben Kling Petersen, Seagate Technology ** [[Media:New-and-Improved-Lustre-Performance-Monitoring-Tool_Kling-Peterson.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://youtu.be/CjLYuGFscuw Video] * Correlating Multiple TB of I/O Performance Data to User Jobs, Michael Kluge, ZIH ** [[Media:folien_lug_2015_michael_kluge-3.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://youtu.be/ETcvobMpcHc Video] * Monitoring a Heterogeneous Lustre environment, Frédérick Lefebvre, Calcul Quebec Universite Laval ** [[Media:Monitoring-an-heterogenous-Lustre-environment_Lefebvre.pdf|Slides]] ** [https://youtu.be/F37B8Uu7Muc Video] * Reliability of NVM devices for I/O acceleration on supercomputing systems, Hitoshi Sato, Tokyo Institute of Technology ** [[Media:Reliability-of-NVM-Devices_Sato.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://youtu.be/neYR2OLzRMs Video] * Scalability Testing of DNE2 in Lustre 2.7, Stephen Simms, Indiana University ** [[Media:Scalability-Testing-of-DNE2-in-Lustre-27_Simms_V2.pdf|Slides]] * Shared File Performance in Lustre: Challenges and Solutions, Patrick Farrell, Cray ** [[Media:Shared-File-Performance-in-Lustre_Farrell.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://youtu.be/ITfZfV5QzIs Video] * OSD-Btrfs, a Novel Lustre OSD based on Btrfs, Shuichi Ihara, Li Xi, DDN ** [[Media:OSD-Btrfs-a-Novel-Lustre-OSD_Ihara_Xi.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://youtu.be/aOHqIj2bOw4 Video] * Deploying Hadoop on Lustre Storage: Lessons learned and best practices, J.Mario Gallegos, Dell; Zhiqi Tao, Intel ** [[Media:Deploying-Hadoop-on-Lustre-Storage_Gallegos_Tao_v2.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://youtu.be/sFNgf5s-bcc Video] * Understanding Hadoop Performance on Lustre, Stephen Skory, Seagate Technology ** [[Media:Understanding-Hadoop-on-Lustre-Performance_Skory.pdf|Slides]] ** [http://youtu.be/VaeHt9IMM9o Video]
[[Lustre User Group 2014|<- LUG'14]] | [[Lustre User Group 2016|LUG'16 ->]]
[[Category: LUG]] [[Category: Events]]
